title: haldina cordifolia
intro: Haldina cordifolia, also known as "Heart Leaf", is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae that is native to Sri Lanka. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems, as well as exerting potential anti-cancer effects. Haldina cordifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and its extracts are also used in modern medicine for their therapeutic potential.
